final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign.

Style/medium: needs an artistic typography aesthetic with layered fonts — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include font stacking with products/subjects partially overlapping text, must balance complexity without visual clutter
Subject: must include products or main subjects blocking portions of the typography
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve layered font composition, must ensure partial occlusion of text by products/subjects, must maintain visual complexity without chaos
Avoid:
